name: file_read
description: Read a file from the allowed data directory and return its content as text. The path is sandboxed to FILE_READ_BASE_DIR — path traversal outside this directory is blocked. Supports text files (UTF-8) and returns file size. Use for reading data files, documents, or previous output files.

path.description: Path to the file to read, relative to the allowed data directory.

max_bytes.description: Maximum bytes to read. Defaults to 1 MB.

truncated.description: True if the file was larger than max_bytes and was truncated
